name: Stier Bus Co
districts_or_customers: Belle Plaine area schools (ISD 716 service area)
recent_news: Operates under multiple DBAs including '4.0 School Services of Belle Plaine' and 'Stier Transportation Service Co Inc' (USDOT 934301); family-owned community operator with no public M&A activity.
fit_notes: Small family-owned MN operator serving Belle Plaine; potential micro tuck-in to fill in Summit's MN footprint, but modest scale (~45 employees) limits standalone value—best as bolt-on to a larger regional acquisition.

name: H H Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: NLRB case 05-RC-288803 (Jan 2022) involved CCPS bus drivers, attendants, and substitutes at H&H's Bryans Road facility, indicating union organizing activity; BBB-accredited since 2016; D&B lists ~$596K revenue and 14 employees (smaller than original record's 45 employees/$1.7M).
fit_notes: Long-tenured (since 1991) owner-operated CCPS contractor with a single principal; succession-attractive given 34+ years in business and small scale. However, recent union activity and modest size (~14 employees per D&B) limit attractiveness as a standalone tuck-in—best paired with adjacent Mid-Atlantic operators.

name: Ecmc Diversified Inc Which
recent_news: Entity registered as 'Nevada ECMC Diversified Inc.' in CA (entity #2254956, incorp. July 7, 2000) with registered address at 962 Gleneagles Rd, Beaumont, CA—a residential property per Redfin. No public evidence of school bus operations; record name fragment 'Which' suggests truncated 'which will do business as' DBA language typical of shell/holding registrations. Likely not an active student transportation operator.
fit_notes: Not a viable tuck-in target—registered address is residential, no operating evidence of school bus services, and the truncated 'Which' in the company name suggests this is a holding/DBA registration shell rather than an active operator. Skip.

name: IPG-USA Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: Record name 'IPG-USA Inc Which Will Do Bus' appears to be a truncated CA Secretary of State filing string (e.g., 'IPG-USA Inc. which will do business in CA as...'), with HQ at a downtown Oakland office building (180 Grand Ave, Suite 900). No public evidence linking this entity to school bus operations; 'IPG' commonly refers to Innovation Properties Group or Interpublic Group, neither of which is a student transportation operator. Likely mis-classified.
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in candidate—the name fragment 'Which Will Do Bus[iness]' is a truncated CA registration string, and the Oakland HQ is a downtown commercial office tower rather than a bus yard. No evidence of school bus operations. Skip.

name: Bertila School Bus
recent_news: D&B lists Bertila School Bus in Houston (alt address 7535 Bellerive Dr; current address 13050 Meadowline Dr) with annual revenue of only ~$65K, suggesting a very small owner-operator or single-bus service rather than a contracted fleet operator. No district contracts, regulatory filings, or news coverage found.
fit_notes: Likely a sole-operator micro-business (~$65K revenue per D&B) at a residential Houston address—not a viable Summit tuck-in. Original record's revenue estimate of $1.7M appears inflated. Skip.
